name: Xero
description: Cloud accounting platform offering APIs for accounting, payroll, assets, files and projects to integrate financial data and workflows.

auth_methods.note: Xero documents support for OAuth 2.0 Authorization Code grant and Client Credentials grant (for custom connections).

credential_access.note: Xero’s official 'Create an app' guide describes signing in to the developer portal and creating an app to obtain credentials (client id/secret) via the portal, indicating self-serve credential creation.

api_surface.note: Xero exposes RESTful JSON APIs across multiple product areas (Accounting, Payroll, Assets, Files, Projects) and provides official SDKs that wrap the REST endpoints.

buildability.note: Xero’s official API documentation describes publicly available APIs and how to use them; combined with the ability to create an app in the developer portal to obtain credentials, integrations can be built and tested today using the documented API surface.

queries: Xero developer documentation API auth OAuth2 developer.xero.com
